generic_rules: Focus repairs on fixing AGREE syntax errors reported by the validator.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or type mismatches.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure helper declarations (`eq`) have correct types (int, real, bool).
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on contract adjustments.
Avoid using implementation-specific details in component type contracts.
Do not attempt to repair code without addressing the specific error message.
